subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! The absolute light hath so illumined the horizons that both East and West have become as the crystal globe of the Divine Lamp [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق نور مطلق آفاق را چنان روشن نمود که خاور و باختر زجاج سراج الهی گشت
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @growth of the Cause
